pali: 20. Tena kho pana samayena koṭisatā arahanto himavante pabbate rakkhitatale sannipatitvā āyasmato nāgasenassa santike dūtaṃ pāhesuṃ‘‘ āgacchatu nāgaseno, dassanakāmā mayaṃ nāgasenan’’ ti.
chinese: 20.當時，百俱胝阿羅漢們在喜馬拉雅山的護坡處集合後，派遣使者到尊者那先面前：「請那先回來，我們想要見那先。

pali: Atha kho āyasmā nāgaseno dūtassa vacanaṃ sutvā asokārāme antarahito himavante pabbate rakkhitatale koṭisatānaṃ arahantānaṃ purato pāturahosi.
chinese: 那時，百俱胝阿羅漢們對尊者那先說這個：「那先！

pali: Atha kho koṭisatā arahanto āyasmantaṃ nāgasenaṃ etadavocuṃ‘‘ eso kho, nāgasena, milindo rājā bhikkhusaṅghaṃ viheṭheti vādappaṭivādena pañhapucchāya.
chinese: 請你調伏彌蘭王，那就好了。

pali: Sādhu, nāgasena, gaccha tvaṃ milindaṃ rājānaṃ damehī’’ ti.
chinese: 大德！

pali: ‘‘ Tiṭṭhatu, bhante, eko milindo rājā;
chinese: 如果在全閻浮提中[全部]國王到來後問我問題，全部回答他後，我將會完全破壞。

pali: sace, bhante, sakalajambudīpe rājāno āgantvā maṃ pañhaṃ puccheyyuṃ, sabbaṃ taṃ visajjetvā sampadālessāmi, gacchatha vo, bhante, acchambhitā sāgalanagaran’’ ti.
chinese: 」那時，上座比丘們建立有袈裟光亮、逆風發出仙人氣味的沙竭城。

pali: Atha kho therā bhikkhū sāgalanagaraṃ kāsāvappajjotaṃ isivātapaṭivātaṃ akaṃsu.
chinese: 21.當時，尊者壽護住在散企耶亞僧房。

pali: 21. Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā āyupālo saṅkhyeyyapariveṇe paṭivasati.
chinese: 先生！

pali: Atha kho milindo rājā amacce etadavoca‘‘ ramaṇīyā vata bho dosinā ratti, kannu khvajja samaṇaṃ vā brāhmaṇaṃ vā upasaṅkameyyāma sākacchāya pañhapucchanāya, ko mayā saddhiṃ sallapituṃ ussahati kaṅkhaṃ paṭivinetun’’ ti.
chinese: 」在這麼說時，五百位臾那人對彌蘭王說這個：「大王！

pali: Evaṃ vutte pañcasatā yonakā rājānaṃ milindaṃ etadavocuṃ‘‘ atthi, mahārāja, āyupālo nāma thero tepiṭako bahussuto āgatāgamo, so etarahi saṅkhyeyyapariveṇe paṭivasati;
chinese: 」「那樣的話，我說，請你們通知大德。

pali: gaccha, tvaṃ mahārāja, āyasmantaṃ āyupālaṃ pañhaṃ pucchassū’’ ti.
chinese: 那時，占相者派遣使者到尊者壽護的面前：「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, bhaṇe, bhadantassa ārocethā’’ ti.
chinese: 彌蘭王想要見尊者壽護。

pali: Atha kho nemittiko āyasmato āyupālassa santike dūtaṃ pāhesi‘‘ rājā, bhante, milindo āyasmantaṃ āyupālaṃ dassanakāmo’’ ti.
chinese: 」那時，彌蘭王被約五百位臾那人圍繞，登上高貴的車後去見尊者壽護。

pali: Āyasmāpi kho āyupālo evamāha‘‘ tena hi āgacchatū’’ ti.
chinese: 抵達後，與尊者壽護互相問候。

pali: Atha kho milindo rājā pañcamattehi yonakasatehi parivuto rathavaramāruyha yena saṅkhyeyyapariveṇaṃ yenāyasmā āyupālo tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā āyasmatā āyupālena saddhiṃ sammodi, sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekamantaṃ nisīdi, ekamantaṃ nisinno kho milindo rājā āyasmantaṃ āyupālaṃ etadavoca‘‘ kimatthiyā, bhante āyupāla, tumhākaṃ pabbajjā, ko ca tumhākaṃ paramattho’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Thero āha‘‘ dhammacariyasamacariyatthā kho, mahārāja, pabbajjā, sāmaññaphalaṃ kho pana amhākaṃ paramattho’’ ti.
chinese: 是的，有在家者是法行者、正行者，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Atthi pana, bhante, koci gihīpi dhammacārī samacārī’’ ti?
chinese: 當世尊在波羅奈仙人落下處的鹿野苑法輪轉起時，有十八俱胝的梵天之法的現觀，又，有超越計算的天神之法的現觀，他們全都是在家生類，非出家者。

pali: ‘‘ Āma, mahārāja, atthi gihīpi dhammacārī samacārī, bhagavati kho, mahārāja, bārāṇasiyaṃ isipatane migadāye dhammacakkaṃ pavattente aṭṭhārasannaṃ brahmakoṭīnaṃ dhammābhisamayo ahosi, devatānaṃ pana dhammābhisamayo gaṇanapathaṃ vītivatto, sabbete gihibhūtā, na pabbajitā.
chinese: 再者，在大集會經[DN.20]被世尊教導時、在大吉祥經被教導時、在寂靜心法門經被教導時、在教誡羅侯羅經[MN.61]被教導時、在敗亡經[AN.7.31]被教導時，有超越計算的天神之法的現觀，他們全都是在家生類，非出家者。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā kho mahāsamayasuttante desiyamāne, mahāmaṅgalasuttante desiyamāne, samacittapariyāyasuttante desiyamāne, rāhulovādasuttante desiyamāne, parābhavasuttante desiyamāne gaṇanapathaṃ vītivattānaṃ devatānaṃ dhammābhisamayo ahosi, sabbete gihibhūtā, na pabbajitā’’ ti.
chinese: 那樣的話，你們的岀家是無意義的，以在往昔所作之惡業的流出，沙門釋迦子們出家以及持頭陀支：壽護大德！

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, bhante āyupāla, niratthikā tumhākaṃ pabbajjā, pubbe katassa pāpakammassa nissandena samaṇā sakyaputtiyā pabbajanti dhutaṅgāni ca pariharanti.
chinese: 凡那些一座食的比丘，他們在往昔當然是拿走他人財物的盜賊，他們掠奪他人的財物後，以那個業的流出，現在成為一座食者，他們經常得不到能受用的，屬於他們的戒不存在、苦行不存在、梵行不存在。

pali: Ye kho te, bhante āyupāla, bhikkhū ekāsanikā, nūna te pubbe paresaṃ bhogahārakā corā, te paresaṃ bhoge acchinditvā tassa kammassa nissandena etarahi ekāsanikā bhavanti, na labhanti kālena kālaṃ paribhuñjituṃ, natthi tesaṃ sīlaṃ, natthi tapo, natthi brahmacariyaṃ.
chinese: 凡那些住露地的比丘，他們在往昔當然是搶劫村落的盜賊，他們使他人的家滅亡後，以那個業的流出，現在成為住露地者，他們得不到能受用的住處，屬於他們的戒不存在、苦行不存在、梵行不存在。

pali: Ye kho pana te, bhante āyupāla, bhikkhū abbhokāsikā, nūna te pubbe gāmaghātakā corā, te paresaṃ gehāni vināsetvā tassa kammassa nissandena etarahi abbhokāsikā bhavanti, na labhanti senāsanāni paribhuñjituṃ, natthi tesaṃ sīlaṃ, natthi tapo, natthi brahmacariyaṃ.
chinese: 凡那些常坐不臥的比丘，他們在往昔當然是路上搶劫的盜賊，他們對旅人捕捉、繫縛、使之坐下後，以那個業的流出，現在成為常坐不臥者，他們得不到能受用的住處，屬於他們的戒不存在、苦行不存在、梵行不存在。

pali: Ye kho pana te, bhante āyupāla, bhikkhū nesajjikā, nūna te pubbe panthadūsakā corā, te paresaṃ pathike jane gahetvā bandhitvā nisīdāpetvā tassa kammassa nissandena etarahi nesajjikā bhavanti, na labhanti seyyaṃ kappetuṃ, natthi tesaṃ sīlaṃ, natthi tapo, natthi brahmacariyan’’ ti āha.
chinese: 即使上座是賢智者，但非無畏者，他不答辯什麼。

pali: Evaṃ vutte āyasmā āyupālo tuṇhī ahosi, na kiñci paṭibhāsi.
Atha kho pañcasatā yonakā rājānaṃ milindaṃ etadavocuṃ‘‘ paṇḍito, mahārāja, thero, api ca kho avisārado na kiñci paṭibhāsatī’’ ti.
chinese: 先生！

pali: Atha kho milindo rājā āyasmantaṃ āyupālaṃ tuṇhībhūtaṃ disvā apphoṭetvā ukkuṭṭhiṃ katvā yonake etadavoca‘‘ tuccho vata bho jambudīpo, palāpo vata bho jambudīpo, natthi koci samaṇo vā brāhmaṇo vā, yo mayā saddhiṃ sallapituṃ ussahati kaṅkhaṃ paṭivinetun’’ ti.
chinese: 22.那時，當彌蘭王環視全部那個群眾時，看見不膽怯、非無精打采的臾那人後，這麼想：「我想，無疑地有其他任何賢智比丘能與我一起交談，依此而這些臾那人為非無精打采的。

pali: 22. Atha kho milindassa rañño sabbaṃ taṃ parisaṃ anuvilokentassa abhīte amaṅkubhūte yonake disvā etadahosi‘‘ nissaṃsayaṃ atthi maññe añño koci paṇḍito bhikkhu, yo mayā saddhiṃ sallapituṃ ussahati, yenime yonakā na maṅkubhūtā’’ ti.
Atha kho milindo rājā yonake etadavoca‘‘ atthi, bhaṇe, añño koci paṇḍito bhikkhu, yo mayā saddhiṃ sallapituṃ ussahati kaṅkhaṃ paṭivinetun’’ ti.

Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā nāgaseno samaṇagaṇaparivuto saṅghī gaṇī gaṇācariyo ñāto yasassī sādhusammato bahujanassa paṇḍito byatto medhāvī nipuṇo viññū vibhāvī vinīto visārado bahussuto tepiṭako vedagū pabhinnabuddhimā āgatāgamo pabhinnapaṭisambhido navaṅgasatthusāsane pariyattidharo pāramippatto jinavacane dhammatthadesanāpaṭivedhakusalo akkhayavicitrapaṭibhāno citrakathī kalyāṇavākkaraṇo durāsado duppasaho duruttaro durāvaraṇo dunnivārayo, sāgaro viya akkhobho, girirājā viya niccalo, raṇañjaho tamonudo pabhaṅkaro mahākathī paragaṇigaṇamathano paratitthiyamaddano bhikkhūnaṃ bhikkhunīnaṃ upāsakānaṃ upāsikānaṃ rājūnaṃ rājamahāmattānaṃ sakkato garukato mānito pūjito apacito lābhī cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhārānaṃ lābhaggayasaggappatto vuddhānaṃ viññūnaṃ sotāvadhānena samannāgatānaṃ sandassento navaṅgaṃ jinasāsanaratanaṃ, upadisanto dhammamaggaṃ, dhārento dhammappajjotaṃ, ussāpento dhammayūpaṃ, yajanto dhammayāgaṃ, paggaṇhanto dhammaddhajaṃ, ussāpento dhammaketuṃ, dhamento[ uppaḷāsento( sī. pī.)] dhammasaṅkhaṃ, āhananto dhammabheriṃ, nadanto sīhanādaṃ , gajjanto indagajjitaṃ, madhuragiragajjitena ñāṇavaravijjujālapariveṭhitena karuṇājalabharitena mahatā dhammāmatameghena sakalalokamabhitappayanto gāmanigamarājadhānīsu cārikaṃ caramāno anupubbena sāgalanagaraṃ anuppatto hoti.
chinese: 因為那樣，往昔他們說：

pali: Tatra sudaṃ āyasmā nāgaseno asītiyā bhikkhusahassehi saddhiṃ saṅkhyeyyapariveṇe paṭivasati.
chinese: 宗義的善巧者，以及在辯才上熟知者。

pali: Tenāhu porāṇā–
‘ ‘ Bahussuto citrakathī, nipuṇo ca visārado;
chinese: 那些三藏師比丘，以及五尼柯耶師，

pali: Sāmayiko ca kusalo, paṭibhāne ca kovido.
chinese: 四尼柯耶師也同樣地，尊敬那先。

pali: ‘ ‘ Te ca tepiṭakā bhikkhū, pañcanekāyikāpi ca;
chinese: 深慧者、聰明者，道非道的熟知者，

pali: Catunekāyikā ceva, nāgasenaṃ purakkharuṃ.
chinese: 最高利益的到達者：無畏的那先。

pali: ‘ ‘ Gambhīrapañño medhāvī, maggāmaggassa kovido;
chinese: 被那些比丘圍繞：被熟練者、被實語者，

pali: Uttamatthaṃ anuppatto, nāgaseno visārado.
chinese: 村落城鎮行走著，前往沙竭。

pali: ‘ ‘ Tehi bhikkhūhi parivuto, nipuṇehi saccavādibhi;
chinese: 然後在散企耶亞僧房處，那先居住，

pali: Caranto gāmanigamaṃ, sāgalaṃ upasaṅkami.
chinese: 他與人們談論，如在山中的獅子。

pali: ‘ ‘ Saṅkhyeyyapariveṇasmiṃ , nāgaseno tadā vasi;
Katheti so manussehi, pabbate kesarī yathā’’ ti.
